item.title: Devon Energy Bets on Scale With Coterra Acquisition
item.description: Devon Energy announced an all-stock merger with Coterra, creating a $58B shale giant. Here’s what the deal means for DVN stock, dividends, and investo...

item.title: Bitcoin Bears Might Benefit From These Inverse Crypto ETFs
item.description: Investors bearish on cryptocurrencies can find a straightforward—though risky—to short either Bitcoin or Ether using these ETFs.

item.title: Verisk Is Extremely Oversold—2 Reasons Contrarians Are Circling
item.description: Verisk’s record-low RSI and fresh bullish analyst backing suggest there is a high-risk, high-reward setup taking shape right now.

item.title: These 3 Stocks Just Graduated to the MSCI World Index
item.description: The MSCI World Index's February review adds three new companies to the global benchmark as capital flows into space, AI, and aerospace sectors.

item.title: Is LyondellBasell’s Nearly 10% Dividend Safe, or a Warning Sign for Investors?
item.description: Chemical giant LyondellBasell now has a dividend yield of nearly 10%. Is this income opportunity something investors should jump at, or approach with ...
